name: Playback Options
label: Playback Options
description:
Controls playback behavior, timing, audio analysis, and spatial audio for the scene.


## Auto Setup

**Auto-Load Actors** automatically loads enough actors to match the number of motion tracks, each driven by a different motion source. **Auto-Assign Camera** automatically uses camera motion when available — useful when switching tracks frequently.


## Playback Mode

Controls how the playlist or track list is traversed:
- *List Once* plays through the list once and stops.
- *Single* loops the current track indefinitely.
- *Loop List* repeats the entire list.
- *Loop Single* repeats the current track with remix behavior.
- *Shuffle* plays tracks in random order without repeating until all have played.

**Remix Mode** controls how remix tracks continue: *Continue Next* advances to the next remix track, *Synchronized* syncs with the primary playback, *Loop* restarts the current remix, and *Shuffle Next* picks a random remix track.


## Speed

**Speed** scales playback rate without affecting pitch when *Pitch Shift* is enabled — useful for slower warm-ups or faster run-throughs. The motion timeline and physics simulation also respect this speed. **Smooth Audio Time** interpolates the motion time between audio updates, reducing jitter on playback; tune **Smooth Time Damping** and **Smooth Time Frequency** to balance smoothness against responsiveness. **Timeline Fine Adjust** enables long-press adjustment on the timeline for precise scrubbing.


## Timing

Sets the default BPM, beat offset, and phrase structure used by the audio player. See *Base Timing* for details.


## Audio Analysis

When enabled, the audio spectrum is processed at the configured **Processing Rate** (45 FPS is usually sufficient). **Band Selection** chooses the frequency range used for audio-reactive effects — narrow the range to focus on bass or treble. **Audio Level Rise** and **Audio Level Fall** control how quickly the level responds to increasing and decreasing audio energy; lower values create smoother, more sustained reactions, higher values track transients closely. **Audio Level Damping** adds overall damping to the signal. **Fade In Out** reduces level spikes at track start and end. **Spectrum Balance** shifts weight between low and high frequencies — lower values favor bass, higher values favor treble.


## Lip Sync

Enables mouth animation driven by audio. **Lip Sync Smoothing** controls how fast the animation reacts; lower values produce steadier mouth movement, higher values follow speech more closely.


## Spatial Audio

Enables 3D spatialization of the audio output. **Spatial Blend** controls how much the audio is panned between the headset speakers. **Follow Actor** moves the audio source with the selected actor, creating a personal listening space. **Select Actor** picks which actor the audio follows.

values.name: Auto-Load Actors
values.label: Auto-Load Actors
values.description: Automatically load actors to match the number of motion tracks and assign different motion for each actor

descriptions.ja: モーショントラックの数に合わせてアクターを自動的にロードし、各アクターに異なるモーションを割り当てます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 自動加載角色以匹配動作軌道的數量，並為每個角色分配不同的動作
descriptions.ko: 모션 트랙 수에 맞춰 자동으로 액터를 로드하고 각 액터에 다른 모션을 할당합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 自动加载角色以匹配动作轨道数量，并为每个角色分配不同的动作。

values.name: Auto-Assign Camera
values.label: Auto-Assign Camera
values.description: Automatically assign camera motion if available

descriptions.ja: 利用可能な場合、カメラモーションを自動的に割り当てます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 如果可用，自動分配攝影機動作
descriptions.ko: 사용 가능한 경우 카메라 모션을 자동으로 할당합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 如果可用，自动分配摄影机动作。

values.name: Smooth Audio Time
values.label: Smooth Audio Time

labels.ja: オーディオ時間のスムージング

values.description: Interpolate motion time between audio updates for smoother playback. Might introduce slight delay.

descriptions.ja: オーディオ更新間のモーション時間を補間し、よりスムーズな再生を実現します。わずかな遅延が生じる可能性があります。
descriptions.zh-TW: 在音訊更新之間插值動作時間，以實現更流暢的播放。可能引入輕微延遲。
descriptions.ko: 더 부드러운 재생을 위해 오디오 업데이트 간에 모션 시간을 보간합니다. 약간의 지연이 발생할 수 있습니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 在音频更新之间插值动作时间，以实现更平滑的播放。可能会引入轻微延迟。

values.name: Smooth Time Damping
values.label: Smooth Time Damping
values.description: Damping factor for smooth audio time. Higher value means more damping and less overshoot.

descriptions.ja: スムーズなオーディオ時間のための減衰係数。値が高いほど減衰が大きく、オーバーシュートが少なくなります。
descriptions.zh-TW: 平滑音訊時間的阻尼係數。較高的數值代表更高的阻尼和更少的過衝。
descriptions.ko: 오디오 시간 평활화를 위한 감쇠 계수입니다. 값이 높을수록 감쇠가 커지고 오버슈트가 적습니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 平滑音频时间的阻尼系数。值越高，阻尼越大，超调越小。

values.name: Smooth Time Frequency
values.label: Smooth Time Frequency

labels.ja: スムーズな時間周波数

values.description: Frequency for smooth audio time. Higher value means faster response to changes but might be less stable.

descriptions.ja: スムーズなオーディオ時間のための周波数。値が高いほど変化への応答は速くなりますが、不安定になる可能性があります。
descriptions.zh-TW: 平滑音訊時間的頻率。較高的數值表示對變化的響應更快，但可能不穩定。
descriptions.ko: 오디오 시간 평활화 주파수입니다. 값이 높을수록 변화에 더 빠르게 반응하지만, 안정성이 떨어질 수 있습니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 平滑音频时间的频率。值越高，对变化的响应越快，但稳定性可能较差。

values.name: Speed
values.label: Speed
values.description: Change speed of audio. This also affects motion and physics speed

descriptions.ja: オーディオの速度を変更します。これはモーションと物理速度にも影響します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 改變音訊速度。這也會影響動作和物理速度。
descriptions.ko: 오디오 속도를 변경합니다. 이는 모션 및 물리 속도에도 영향을 미칩니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 改变音频速度。这也影响动作和物理速度。

values.name: Pitch Shift
values.label: Pitch Shift
values.description: Adjust audio to match the original pitch after changing speed

descriptions.ja: 速度変更後、オリジナルのピッチに合うようにオーディオを調整します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 改變速度後，調整音訊以匹配原始音高。
descriptions.ko: 속도 변경 후 원래 피치에 맞게 오디오를 조정합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 改变速度后，调整音频以匹配原始音高。

values.name: Timeline Fine Adjust
values.label: Timeline Fine Adjust
values.description: Long press on the timeline to fine adjust playback time.

descriptions.ja: タイムラインを長押しすると、再生時間を微調整できます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 長按時間軸以精細調整播放時間。
descriptions.ko: 타임라인을 길게 눌러 재생 시간을 세밀하게 조정합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 长按时间轴以精细调整播放时间。

values.name: Default Timing
values.label: Default Timing

labels.ja: デフォルトタイミング

values.description: Holds BPM, beat offset, phrase structure, loop range, and motion speed for an audio track. Designed to be reused wherever timing configuration is needed.

descriptions.ja: (Holds BPM, beat offset, phrase structure, loop range, and motion speed for an audio track. Designed to be reused wherever timing configuration is needed.)
descriptions.zh-TW: (Holds BPM, beat offset, phrase structure, loop range, and motion speed for an audio track. Designed to be reused wherever timing configuration is needed.)
descriptions.ko: (Holds BPM, beat offset, phrase structure, loop range, and motion speed for an audio track. Designed to be reused wherever timing configuration is needed.)
descriptions.zh-CN: (Holds BPM, beat offset, phrase structure, loop range, and motion speed for an audio track. Designed to be reused wherever timing configuration is needed.)

labels.ja: フレーズあたりのビート数

values.name: Processing Rate
values.label: Processing Rate
values.description: Rate of audio processing. Since the system only updates audio data at a fixed rate, usually no need to go above 45 FPS.

descriptions.ja: オーディオ処理のレート。システムは固定レートでのみオーディオデータを更新するため、通常は45 FPSを超える必要はありません。
descriptions.zh-TW: 音訊處理速率。由於系統只以固定速率更新音訊資料，通常不需要超過 45 FPS。
descriptions.ko: 오디오 처리 속도입니다. 시스템이 고정된 비율로만 오디오 데이터를 업데이트하기 때문에 일반적으로 45 FPS를 초과할 필요는 없습니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 音频处理速率。由于系统只以固定速率更新音频数据，通常不需要超过 45 FPS。

values.name: Band Selection
values.label: Band Selection
values.description: Select the range of bands to calculate loudness level

descriptions.ja: ラウドネスレベルを計算するバンド範囲を選択します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 選擇計算聲大度級別的頻帶範圍
descriptions.ko: 라우드니스 레벨 계산을 위한 대역 범위를 선택합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 选择用于计算响度水平的频段范围。

labels.ja: オーディオレベル上昇
オーディオレベル下降
オーディオレベル減衰

values.name: Fade In Out
values.label: Fade In Out
values.description: Fade in and out audio level at the beginning and end of the audio.

descriptions.ja: オーディオの開始時と終了時にオーディオレベルをフェードイン/アウトします。
descriptions.zh-TW: 在音訊開始和結束處淡入和淡出音訊級別。
descriptions.ko: 오디오 시작점과 끝점에서 오디오 레벨을 페이드 인/아웃합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 在音频开始和结束时淡入和淡出音频级别。

values.name: Spectrum Balance
values.label: Spectrum Balance
values.description: Adjust balance between low and high frequency bands when calculating audio level.

descriptions.ja: オーディオレベルを計算する際に、低周波数帯と高周波数帯のバランスを調整します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 在計算音訊級別時，調整低頻和高頻頻帶之間的平衡。
descriptions.ko: 오디오 레벨을 계산할 때 저음과 고음 대역 간의 균형을 조정합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 计算音频级别时，调整低频和高频频段之间的平衡。

labels.ja: リップシンクスムージング

values.name: Spatial Blend
values.label: Spatial Blend
values.description: Blend the 3D effect of the spatial audio

descriptions.ja: 空間オーディオの3D効果をブレンドします。
descriptions.zh-TW: 混合空間音訊的 3D 效果
descriptions.zh-CN: 混合空间音频的 3D 效果
